---
title: "Sebastian Jaramillo"
subtitle: "Ph.D. Candidate in Mathematics | Probability, MCMC, Time Series, and Quantitative Modeling"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}

Welcome. I am a Ph.D. candidate in Mathematics at the University of Oregon, with research interests in probability, Markov chain Monte Carlo methods, Hamiltonian Monte Carlo, and quantitative modeling.

My website connects my academic research with applied projects in time series, econometrics, machine learning, and quantitative finance.

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}

![Sebastian Jaramillo](assets/img/profile.jpg){width="100%"}

:::

:::
